---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What user problem are you trying to solve? Skip the "wouldn't it be nice if" framing — describe the concrete pain. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to see. Sketches, mockups, or pseudo-code welcome but not required. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Pure UI change (no backend changes needed)
- [ ] Requires backend API/WebSocket changes (link to `snapper` issue if filed)
- [ ] Touches generated files (`*.generated.*`)

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: related issues, willingness to contribute a PR, deadline pressure, etc. -->
